hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs connect KYC and KYB provider outputs into a unified onboarding workflow that preserves audit trails and supports risk-based identity and counterparty verification.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding delays caused by disconnected identity checks
problem_description: VASP compliance teams face slow onboarding when KYC, KYB and identity verification outputs remain separated across multiple providers. This fragmentation leads to manual reviews, inconsistent risk assessments and weak audit trails for verification decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity, company and risk provider outputs into one structured onboarding workflow that supports risk-based review, decision tracking and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY integrates KYC and KYB provider results with screening, risk rules and review workflows to guide structured onboarding approvals and evidence retention.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding workflows, decisions, cases and audit evidence without replacing existing digital asset compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing identity verification with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and deployment standards for reliable onboarding and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support VASP identity verification workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how provider checks integrate into onboarding cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit trails preserve onboarding decisions and evidence

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP identity verification?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding workflows, helping VASPs manage identity verification, risk review, and regulatory rule alignment in one audit-ready compliance layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate onboarding providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes selected KYC, KYB, sanctions and adverse media checks by jurisdiction, risk level and client type to create consistent, explainable onboarding and counterparty due diligence workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence for every onboarding step, enabling compliance teams to review and defend identity verification decisions effectively.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB and screening providers, sitting above them to connect outputs into controlled workflows with role-based access and audit logging.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but connects their results into operational workflows, case management, evidence preservation and reporting workflows.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into connected onboarding cases with audit-ready evidence and risk-based review controls.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
